_comment: Optional expansion packs — not included in default player download. Install via wizard or apply_expansion.py

subterranean.label: Subterranean
subterranean.description: Dungeon and underground zones under their parent continents (Undermine, Blackrock, Ulduar, etc.)

other_worlds.label: Other Worlds
other_worlds.description: Extra-world zones on the far side of the globe (Outland, Draenor, Shadowlands, etc.)
